global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a logo, game icons, and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join a gaming arena with friends.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively backdrop.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'PixelForge' appears at the top left, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons are arranged in a grid pattern, each with a subtle outline.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular decorative element sits at the top center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Top left decorative element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular decorative element is positioned at the top left, complementing the logo.

elements.label: Top right decorative element
elements.description: A narrow rectangular decorative element is located at the top right, balancing the layout.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element is positioned near the top center, adding detail.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular decorative element is located near the top left, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: The text 'Join the arena Play with friends tonight' is prominently displayed in bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button labeled 'Get offer' is positioned at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: The text 'Join the arena Play with friends tonight' is prominently displayed in bold, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: The text 'Get offer' is displayed in a clear, bold font at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, game icons are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
